name: Sokoboxes Duo
short_description: The first Sokoban-based game built to require two buddies. 637 handcrafted puzzles: 115 duo and 522 solo levels. Play duo levels with 1 or 2 controllers, switching characters or playing together. Beat your records and enjoy clean visuals with a charming comic story.
detailed_description:
Sokoboxes Duo: True Cooperation & Puzzle History

If you’re a puzzle fan, you probably know Sokoban. It’s one of the simplest logical games ever created, yet surprisingly challenging.

What happens when a fan decided to expand the game’s core nature to a warehouse that requires two workers to organize? That’s where Sokoboxes Duo begins—taking the genre into brand-new territory.

🧩 Puzzles with Two Buddies

In Sokoboxes Duo, the 115 duo levels were built from the ground up to require two workers. The second character is always a buddy who helps you, never an obstacle that gets in your way.

  • 84 levels by the legendary Aymeric du Peloux.

  • 31 levels by other expert authors.

This is a true novelty: puzzles that demand real cooperation where every character has an essential role.

👁️ Proper Visuals for Focus

When a puzzle is easy, graphics don't matter. But when you hit a “knot” and try to solve it, distracting visuals can make your head spin.

  • Built for Focus: Our graphics are clean and optimized to be easy on your eyes.

  • No Eye Strain: Everything is clear at a glance, so you can focus on the logic without getting tired.

📖 A Story with Heart

Inside the game, a high-quality comic tells the story of our characters: the lovable Penguin, the peaceful Bear, and the agile Neko. You'll learn how they met and why they decided to work together in the warehouse. It adds a sense of adventure to the logic.

🎓 The "Solo Path"

We’ve included a collection of 522 solo levels as extra content. I brought them together so you can play all of Aymeric’s levels (both duo and solo) in one single game:

  • 223 levels by Aymeric du Peloux.

  • 262 levels by Evgeny Grigoriev.

  • 37 levels by other expert authors.

🎯 Why is it fun?

After you solve a puzzle, the game saves your step count. Later, you can watch your solution again and try to beat your own record.

The real joy comes from finding solutions with fewer paths and breaking your own record. You aren't racing others—you are refining your own logic.

✅ Why Sokoboxes Duo?

  • 115 Duo + 522 Solo Levels: Enough content to keep you playing for over a year.

  • For Every Skill: Levels are sorted from "Beginner" to "Ultimate."

  • Made by Fans: A love letter to Sokoban.
